testcase.name: Successfully create an account with default balance
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789 and alias "hellow12"....................passed Then The account with CBU 123456789 should be have a balance of 0.0.........passed

testcase.name: Successfully create an account with an initial balance
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed Then The account with CBU 123456789 should be have a balance of 1000.0......passed

testcase.name: Cant create an account with a repeat CBU
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to create another account with the same CBU 123456789, diferent alias "goodevening15" and a balance of 1000.0.passed Then The operation should be denied due to repeat CBU.......................passed

testcase.name: Cant create an account with a repeat alias
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to create another account with the same alias "hellow12", diferent CBU 55555555 and a balance of 1000.0.passed Then The operation should be denied due to repeat alias.....................passed

testcase.name: Successfully dates modification
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I change alias to "bye14"..............................................passed Then The alias account should be "bye14"....................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully remove account

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I remove the account...................................................undefined Then The account should be dont exist.......................................skipped

testcase.name: I cant remove a inexistent account

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A inexistent account with CBU 111111..................................undefined When I try to remove the account............................................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent account...............skipped

testcase.name: Successfully direction modification

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19900413".undefined When I modificate direction to Street 15....................................skipped Then The direction should be Street 15......................................skipped

testcase.name: Successfully name modification

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19900413".undefined When I modificate name to Josh..............................................skipped Then The name should be Josh................................................skipped

testcase.name: Successfully surname modification

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19900413".undefined When I modificate surname to Garcia.........................................skipped Then The surname should be Garcia...........................................skipped

testcase.name: Cant modificate born date

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19900413".undefined When I try to modificate born date to "20241018"............................skipped Then The born date should be "19900413".....................................skipped And The operation should be denied due to cant modificate this date.........skipped

testcase.name: Cant modificate DNI

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19900413".undefined When I try to modificate DNI to 12346.......................................skipped Then The DNI should be 12345................................................skipped And The operation should be denied due to cant modificate this date.........skipped

testcase.name: Successfully remove client

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.undefined When I remove the client....................................................skipped Then The client should be dont exist........................................skipped

testcase.name: I cant remove a inexistent client

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A inexistent client with DNI: 55555...................................undefined When I try to remove the client.............................................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent client................skipped

testcase.name: Successfully create a client
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed Then The client should be create with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed

testcase.name: Cant create a client with repeat DNI
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed When I try to create another client with DNI 12345..........................passed Then The operation should be denied due to repeat DNI.......................passed

testcase.name: Successfully deposit money into an account

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I deposit 200.0 into the account.......................................undefined Then The account balance should be 1200.0...................................skipped

testcase.name: Cannot deposit a negative amount

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to deposit -100.0 into the account...............................undefined Then The operation should be denied due to negative amount..................skipped And The account balance should remain 1000.0................................skipped

testcase.classname: Search if the cliente is married
testcase.name: Successfully found the client is married

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19900413" and his wife who is client too with DNI: 56789, name: Kamala, surname: Harrison, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19911013".undefined When I look for the fist account marriage...................................skipped Then I get the wedding date.................................................skipped

testcase.classname: Search if the cliente is married
testcase.name: Cant found the client is married

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: Math, surname: Johnson, direction: "Street 14" and born date: "19900413".undefined When I look if the client is marrige........................................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to the client is not marriage.......skipped

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 123456789 and radicate on the sucursal1...........undefined When I look for the account branch..........................................skipped Then I find the sucursal1...................................................skipped

testcase.name: Successfully create a sucursal

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given I create a sucursal with sucursalNumber: 1, name: sucursal1, direction: "Street 16".undefined Then The sucursalNumber should be 1, the name should be sucursal1 and the direction should de "Street 16".skipped

testcase.name: Cant create a sucursal with repeat sucursalNumber

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given I create a sucursal with sucursalNumber: 1, name: sucursal1, direction: "Street 16".undefined When I try to create another sucursal with sucursalNumber: 1, name: sucursal2, direction: "Street 21".skipped Then The first sucursal should be create with sucursalNumber 1, name sucursal1 and direction "Street 16".skipped And The operation should be denied due to repeat sucursalNumber.............skipped

testcase.failure: Given I create a sucursal with sucursalNumber: 1, name: sucursal1, direction: "Street 16".undefined When I modificate direction to "Street 21"..................................skipped Then The direction should be "Street 21"....................................skipped

testcase.name: Cant modifcate sucursalNumber

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given I create a sucursal with sucursalNumber: 1, name: sucursal1, direction: "Street 16".undefined When I try to modificate sucursalNumber to 2................................skipped Then The sucursalNumber should be 1.........................................skipped And The operation should be denied due to cant modificate this date.........skipped

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A sucursal with sucursalNumber: 1, name: sucursal1, direction: "Street 16" with out accounts.undefined When I remove the sucursal..................................................skipped Then The sucursal should be dont exist......................................skipped

testcase.name: I cant remove a sucursal with accounts

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given A sucursal with sucursalNumber: 1, name: sucursal1, direction: "Street 16" with accounts.undefined When I try to remove the sucursal...........................................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to this sucursal have accounts......skipped

testcase.name: Successfully transfer money

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with alias hellow12 and a balance of 1000.0 and a second account with alias bye45 and balance of 1000.0.undefined When I transfer 200.0 into the second account...............................skipped Then The first account balance should be 800.0 and the second account balance should be 1200.0.skipped

testcase.name: Cannot transfer a negative amount

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with alias hellow12 and a balance of 1000.0 and a second account with alias bye45 and balance of 1000.0.undefined When I try to transfer -100.0 into the second account.......................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to negative amount..................skipped And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.skipped

testcase.name: Cannot transfer more money than available balance

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with alias hellow12 and a balance of 1000.0 and a second account with alias bye45 and balance of 1000.0.undefined When I try to transfer 1100.0 into the second account.......................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to insufficient founds..............skipped And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.skipped

testcase.name: Cannot transfer to inexistent alias

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with alias hellow12 and a balance of 1000.0 and a inexistent alias fail15.undefined When I try to transfer 200.0 to the alias fail15............................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent alias.................skipped And The account balance should remain 1000.0................................skipped

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 1234 and a balance of 1000.0 and a second account with CBU 5678 and balance of 1000.0.undefined When I transfer 200.0 into the second account...............................skipped Then The first account balance should be 800.0 and the second account balance should be 1200.0.skipped

testcase.name: Cannot transfer a negative amount

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 1234 and a balance of 1000.0 and a second account with CBU 5678 and balance of 1000.0.undefined When I try to transfer -100.0 into the second account.......................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to negative amount..................skipped And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.skipped

testcase.name: Cannot transfer more money than available balance

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 1234 and a balance of 1000.0 and a second account with CBU 5678 and balance of 1000.0.undefined When I try to transfer 1100.0 into the second account.......................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to insufficient founds..............skipped And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.skipped

testcase.name: Cannot transfer to inexistent cbu

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 1234 and a balance of 1000.0 and a inexistent cbu 9999.undefined When I try to transfer 200.0 to the cbu 9999................................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent cbu...................skipped And The account balance should remain 1000.0................................skipped

testcase.name: Successfully withdraw money when the balance is sufficient

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 123456789 and a balance of 1000.0.................undefined When I withdraw 300.0 from the account......................................skipped Then The account balance should be 700.0....................................skipped

testcase.name: Cannot withdraw more money than available balance

failure.message: The scenario has pending or undefined step(s)

testcase.failure: Given An account with CBU 123456789 and a balance of 1000.0.................undefined When I try to withdraw 1100.0 from the account..............................skipped Then The operation should be denied due to insufficient founds..............skipped And The account balance should remain 1000.0................................skipped
